programme.title: Adventures of the Wilderness Family
programme.desc: The Robinson family decide to leave city life behind for one of clean living in the wilderness for the sake of their daughters health There they learn the value of family as they become closer to nature

programme.title: Endless summer
programme.desc: The crown jewel to ten years of Bruce Brown surfing documentaries Brown follows two young surfers around the world in search of the perfect wave and ends up finding quite a few in addition to some colorful local characters

programme.title: The Jesse Ownes Stories
programme.desc: In the 1960s Jesse Owens Dorian Harewood is accused of tax evasion So court-appointed investigator Lew Gilbert Georg Stanford Brown takes a look into Owens back story What he finds is a life full of both adversity and triumph As a young man Owens faces racism on a daily basis but eventually teams up with white coach Charles Riley George Kennedy and pushes his way into the 1936 Olympics There he triumphs in the face of Hitler and serves as a beacon for black America

programme.title: TBH 130
programme.desc: TBH 130

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E23
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E23

programme.title: Munsters 104

programme.desc: Addams 218

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Gophers friend Phil offers him a job managing his hotel Magician Kens assistant Maggie is upset when he sends his brother Al to replace him in the act Hetty moves into a ships cabin to get closer to porter Charlie

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe finds another way to destroy the Cannonball Express Floyd and Charley wont run the train because some birds have built a nest on the tracks

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A new grocery store opens in Pixley The store has a wide variety of products at a discount price Sam Drucker starts losing customers

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After Kim leaves her job to pursue her dream of writing a novel her husband David convinces her to make an erotic recording on a 976 number to bring in extra cash But Kim starts to have a mental breakdown when an obsessed caller begins murdering Meanwhile after reading Kims manuscript David wonders if Kim has herself assumed the murderous sexually deviant personality of the heroine of her novel

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A cop learns that an illustrator of Tales from the Crypt might have the power to make his monstrous creations come to life due to his shrewish wife

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Enoch the two-faced man an attraction at a sideshow falls in love with a 4000 year old mummy eventually leading up to the conception of their bastard child The Crypt Keeper

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A photographer decides not to stop a woman from committing suicide in order to get some good pictures of the tragedy His new female assistant makes him face his lack of empathy

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A nurse wants the husband of her patient for herself so she delves into black magic to get rid of her patient However her plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Knight 304
programme.desc: Knight 304

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Using a cursed pen a pulp writer transforms himself into an acclaimed novelist who is known for getting inside the minds of serial killers

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Mchale 406
programme.desc: Mchale 406

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter receives anonymous love letters

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper trains Gilligan to be his replacement leader in case he is captured by savages But when The Skipper is actually captured by savages can Gilligan actually take control

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampas vanity gets the best of him when he refuses to acknowledge that he needs eyeglasses to pass the vision test for his new California drivers license

programme.title: Smart 425
programme.desc: Smart 425

programme.title: Smart 507
programme.desc: Smart 507

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ relocates to California and assembles a team of lady truckers to run a lucrative load from Los Angeles to San Francisco But BJs operation threatens to derail the gravy trains of Trans Cal Trucking and SCAT Captain Rutherford T Grant

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur bets an old college rival 5 bills that Ed can out-jump his horse He has second thoughts after he realizes that 5 bills equals 500

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol and Wilbur convert the barn into a temporary polling precinct so Ed wants to vote too

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink helps an old friend by assisting Hogan in the theft of the plans for an assassination on the Fuehrer

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Three American women show up at Stalag 13 and Hogan wants to know why

programme.title: Mchale 407
programme.desc: Mchale 407

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw plans to use a flock of trained birds to steal a precious jewel

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD is threatening to steal the King of Fuzugs treasure Inspector Gadgets mission is to save the treasure from Dr Claw

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Trainee Captain Cunningham proves himself inept when his mistake strands Merrills tour group in a hurricane Jean Carter has mixed feelings about meeting her birth mother Isaac takes a cruise as a passenger and meets passenger Mara

programme.title: WKRP 122
programme.desc: WKRP 122

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Hercules 107
programme.desc: Hercules 107

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Larry Clark is a bio engineer who works on the skrills When the companions decide to get rid of a series one of them joins with Clark

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens suffer from radiation poisoning and develop suits to protect themselves Meanwhile the government attempts to shut down Harrison and his team believing that the alien menace is no more

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by an Army hero before he dies to help his son enlist in the Army Cheyenne succeeds but the young man becomes disillusioned because of his horse and a head strong post commander who also is causing an Indian uprising

programme.title: Young 216
programme.desc: Young 216

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller have less than 48 hours to prevent a politically motivated assassination by a mentally unstable but very accurate marksman

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A top mob leader Frank Wayne is endangering the US economy Phelpss plan attacks Wayne on various fronts First the IMF watches as Jimmy Bibo one of Waynes associates is forced to dig his own grave The IMF has a doctor ready to revive Bibo -- if Waynes killer leaves the scene in time Second Phelps has a cover as an ambitious prosecutor on Waynes trail Finally Rollin is ready to take Waynes place But once Rollin has made the switch other mob bosses want Wayne to leave the country -- which will ruin the complicated plan

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is arrested in a play arrest which soon turns real at an annual town celebration in which Marshal Judd tries to hide him from Lt Gerard with the aid of his fiancée Laura to collect a suspected reward for Kimbles capture

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The Barkleys prepare for the unveiling of a statue dedicated to family patriarch Tom prompting Victoria to visit Heaths birthplace and learn about Toms secret past

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 29 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Tyler Kinghorn vs. Liam McGowen; Mike Parsons vs. Randy Mahon; BJ Baldonado vs. Nequoyah Sethi; Mark Maruzs vs. Rolando Cespedes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Vladimir Zenin v. Nick Aggalar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Salih Kulucan v. Ryan Scott

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brains Caribbean holiday is interrupted by a gang of MAD pirates

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 is shot by Crasher while attempting to destroy Cy-Kills pulsar generator

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Following Audrics signal the Lightning League enters the Pirates Guild zone commanded by the pirate queen Morgana an old love of Hercs The Pride is boarded robbed and Herc and Oon are taken prisoners Jayce Gillian and Flora follow them concealed by an invisible bubble Saw Boss is given Oon as his share of the loot but he recognizes him and insists upon having Jayce Morgana reluctantly attempts to force Herc to tell of Jayces whereabouts but then she changes sides and fights Saw Boss Jayce rescues Herc and Morgana and she gives up her pirating ways to fight Monster Minds

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison
